description: LLM fallback with retry, user notification, and polling for primary model availability

steps.name: GroqProvider retry + fallback + availability check
steps.description: Add retry with exponential backoff (2 attempts, 1s/3s) to GroqProvider.generate(). On 503 after retries, fallback to GROQ_FALLBACK_MODEL_NAME. Return (text, used_fallback) tuple. Add check_availability() method for polling. Add GROQ_FALLBACK_MODEL_NAME and GROQ_MAX_RETRIES to Settings. Add GET /api/llm-status endpoint.
acceptance_criteria: generate() retries 2 times on 503 before falling back
check_availability() tests primary model with minimal request
GET /api/llm-status returns primary_available and model name

steps.name: RAG pipeline + query endpoint propagate fallback flag
steps.description: Update SynthesisGenerator and RAGPipeline to handle the (text, used_fallback) return from LLMProvider. Propagate used_fallback, fallback_model, primary_model in the query response. Update query endpoint to include these fields.
acceptance_criteria: RAG pipeline result includes used_fallback boolean
When fallback is used, response includes fallback_model and primary_model names
When primary model is used, used_fallback is false and no fallback fields present

steps.name: Fallback banner with polling and retry
steps.description: When query response has used_fallback=true, show a yellow banner explaining the fallback. Banner has two actions: 'Riprova con il modello principale' (polls GET /api/llm-status every 15s, auto-retries when available) and 'Continua con questa risposta' (dismisses banner). Add checkLlmStatus() to api.ts and fallback fields to types.ts.
acceptance_criteria: Yellow banner appears when used_fallback is true
Banner shows fallback model name and explanation in Italian
When primary becomes available, query is automatically re-submitted
No banner when primary model is used
